# Risk Management Plan

## Purpose
Define how risks will be identified, assessed, responded to, and monitored across the project.

## Audience
Project Manager, Risk & Issue Manager, PMO, Delivery Leads, Sponsors.

## Inputs
- Project charter (`docs/templates/governance/project-charter-template-waterfall.md`).
- Risk register (`docs/templates/risk/risk-register-waterfall.xlsx`).
- Risk breakdown structure (`docs/templates/risk/risk-breakdown-structure-template-cross.yaml`).

## 1. Risk Management Approach
Describe the risk management lifecycle, cadence, and governance expectations.

## 2. Roles & Responsibilities
| Role | Responsibilities | Escalation Authority |
| --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |

## 3. Risk Categories
Reference the risk breakdown structure and list project-specific categories.

## 4. Probability / Impact Matrix Definitions
| Rating | Probability Definition | Impact Definition |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 |  |  |
| 2 |  |  |
| 3 |  |  |
| 4 |  |  |
| 5 |  |  |

## 5. Qualitative & Quantitative Analysis Methods
- **Qualitative:** scoring, heat maps, risk ranking.
- **Quantitative:** Monte Carlo, decision tree, sensitivity analysis.

## 6. Thresholds for Escalation
Define when risks must be escalated to governance or sponsors.

## 7. Risk Response Strategies
- **Avoid**
- **Mitigate**
- **Transfer**
- **Accept**

## 8. Monitoring & Reporting
- Risk review cadence and reporting audiences.
- Link to risk report (`docs/templates/risk/risk-report-template-cross.md`).
- Update frequency for the risk register (`docs/templates/risk/risk-register-waterfall.xlsx`).

## Completion Checklist
- [ ] Roles and escalation thresholds agreed.
- [ ] Probability/impact scales documented.
- [ ] Risk response strategies defined.
- [ ] Reporting cadence and artifacts confirmed.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Risk management plan aligns with governance expectations.
- Risk register updates follow the defined cadence.
